effect: 8 damage; apply Burning for 9 sec

effect: 10 damage; apply Chilled for 9 sec

name: Stone Shard
effect: 14 piercing damage

name: Arcane Missile
effect: 12 damage; mild homing

name: Flame Wave
effect: 16 cone damage; apply Burning for 9 sec

effect: 18 damage; jumps through Wet zones

effect: 30 slow area damage; destroys cover

name: Ice Comet
effect: 26 area damage; apply Chilled for 9 sec

name: Ward
effect: 30 health frontal shield for 12.6 sec

name: Barrier Dome
effect: 360 degree barrier for 9 sec; blocks hostile statuses, Aether Leech, and weather exposure

name: Reflect
effect: Reflect projectile during 3.6 sec window

name: Dispel
effect: Remove two harmful statuses or one zone edge
counters: Bait it; reapply later; direct damage

name: Blink
gesture: wide Z: right then diagonal down-left then right
effect: Short movement burst; invisible for 3 sec with brief evade; breaks homing
setup_or_payoff: Escapes Root and makes Practice AI aim randomly
counters: Track landing; area zone; delay release

name: Stone Wall
effect: Create destructible line-of-sight cover for up to 24 sec

name: Haste
effect: 30 percent movement speed for 18 sec; removes Chilled
counters: Sloth Hex; Aether Leech; force defense

name: Aether Surge
effect: Gain 5 extra Aether/sec for 18 sec after channel

name: Amplify
effect: Apply Mark for up to 15 sec; next direct hit gains 35 percent
counters: Dispel; Brace; force a weak consumption

name: Ember Attunement
effect: Ember costs 15 percent less for 18 sec

name: Grounding Mantle
effect: Reduce direct damage 15 percent and become Grounded for 15 sec; slower movement
setup_or_payoff: Cancels lightning bonus and new Static while active

name: Weaken
effect: Target deals 22 percent less damage for 12 sec

name: Sunder
effect: Target takes 20 percent more direct damage for 12 sec

name: Sloth Hex
effect: Slow movement and Stamina recovery 30 percent for 12 sec

name: Aether Leech
effect: Drain up to 18 Aether, including the target's final Aether; gain half
setup_or_payoff: Can reduce target Aether to zero
counters: Spend Aether before hit; pressure the caster

name: Veil Hex
effect: Distort visible trace ink and hide confidence for 6 sec

name: Entangle
effect: Root for 3 sec; target may cast

name: Frost Bind
effect: Freeze for 3 sec only if target is Chilled; target cannot move or cast

name: Concussive Blast
effect: 6 damage; knockback; interrupt channel

name: Eclipse Glare
effect: White out the opponent area for 4 sec while controls, guides, HUD, and spells remain visible
setup_or_payoff: Removes Practice AI opponent awareness for the duration
counters: Dispel; wait; use guides and visible spells

name: Thunderclap
effect: 8 damage; stun 2 sec only on Soaked or Static 2; target cannot move or cast

name: Oil Script
effect: Place shared Oil zone for 21 sec

name: Rain Glyph

counters: Dispel; wait out weather; Grounding mitigates Storm

name: Gust Wall
effect: Create 1.8 sec Gust zone and 1.2 sec light-projectile deflect window

name: Quake

counters: Blink; Sidestep at release; interrupt windup

name: Fog Cloud
effect: Shared reduced visibility zone for 18 sec
setup_or_payoff: Conceals setup but affects caster too

name: Rune Snare
effect: Visible trap lasts up to 24 sec and roots 2 sec when crossed
setup_or_payoff: Placed just ahead of the enemy lane to control movement

name: Mirror Twin
effect: Create one decoy matching next windup for 12 sec
counters: Quake; area spell; watch movement shadow

name: Hourglass Field
effect: 18 sec zone slows projectiles and movement 25 percent for both players

name: Phoenix Covenant
effect: For 15 sec the next lethal hit leaves caster at 1 health; once per round
counters: Bait with small hit; Dispel; delayed damage

name: Prismatic Beam
effect: Channel up to 28 damage over 2 sec while immobile
setup_or_payoff: Power depends on prior mixed resonance
